title: lomatium scabrum
intro: Lomatium scabrum, also known as Bear Clover, is a perennial plant native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant's health benefits include relief from respiratory issues, such as colds and flu, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and pneumonia. Lomatium scabrum can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used depending on individual needs and preferences.
